sections.paragraph:
- Original: σύρω

- Transliteration: Suro

- Phonetic: soo'-ro

- Definition:

1. to draw, drag

a. of one before the judge, to prison, to punishment

- Origin: probably akin to G138

- TDNT entry: to trail

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: Probably akin to G138; to trail: - drag draw hale.
